commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b5fb210f6abb97defa6c73f7e4fe0e7060ea3698)
commands.review_summary:
This PR persists enriched protocol mismatch details on Control UI GatewayRequestError, treats PROTOCOL_MISMATCH as non-recoverable for the Control UI browser client, and adds UI regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +32. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main can carry PROTOCOL_MISMATCH details into pendingConnectError, but the Control UI close handler only suppresses reconnects for detail codes listed by isNonRecoverableAuthError. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus a sibling-surface code update, so this should stay in normal PR review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: stop reconnecting on protocol mismatch
target.body:
﻿## Summary

- persist normalized protocol-mismatch details on `GatewayRequestError`
- classify `PROTOCOL_MISMATCH` as a non-recoverable connect error so Control UI does not reconnect-loop
- add regression coverage for bare mismatch detail normalization and structured mismatch reconnect suppression

Closes #98413.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-with-env.mjs OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 -- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts ui/src/ui/gateway.node.test.ts -t "PROTOCOL_MISMATCH" --testTimeout=30000`
- `node scripts/run-with-env.mjs OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 -- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts ui/src/ui/gateway.node.test.ts --testTimeout=30000`
- `corepack pnpm ui:build`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: haruaiclone-droid
